name: ASUS X870 MAX GAMING WIFI7 W ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C (DP1.4a Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS X870 MAX GAMING WIFI7 W ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Premium AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 7, and dual USB4 for extreme gaming and content creation.
